## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run audit:open-source`
- [ ] Desktop smoke test, if UI or Electron behavior changed
- [ ] Android sync/build, if Capacitor or mobile behavior changed

## Data And Privacy

- [ ] No `library/`, `config/`, `release/`, `dist/`, `.env*`, or generated Android web assets are committed
- [ ] No API keys, private local paths, personal screenshots, or downloaded copyrighted asset packs are committed
